lead: Exploring the latest trends and challenges in education technology and its impact on learning environments.

stories.title: The Canvas Hack Is a New Kind of Ransomware Debacle
stories.summary: A significant breach at Instructure, the company behind the Canvas learning management system, has left thousands of schools across the US unable to access their educational resources. The hackers, known as ShinyHunters, have raised concerns about cybersecurity in educational technology, highlighting vulnerabilities that could disrupt learning. This incident underscores the urgent need for enhanced security measures in digital education platforms.

stories.title: Why you can’t build a startup ecosystem on panels and piss-ups
stories.summary: The article argues that Melbourne's startup ecosystem requires more than just networking events and discussions; it needs practical, hands-on tech education to foster growth. The author emphasizes the importance of creating a supportive environment for startups through educational initiatives that equip entrepreneurs with the necessary skills and knowledge. This approach could lead to a more sustainable and innovative business landscape.
